system.description: The Echoed channels a burst of Iron Afterlife resonance outward in a 10-foot radius. All enemies in range take 5 + RESONANCE damage and receive Expose 2. Enemies that are already at or below half HP instead take 8 + RESONANCE damage and receive Expose 3. The Echoed cannot use this card if their own HP is at full — it requires the resonance of proximity to the threshold.
